basic_details.job_title: NIT Trichy Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: NIT Trichy is recruiting 1 Project Assistant for a chemistry-related research project in Civil Engineering Department.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated to shortlisted candidates

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: Less than 32 years (Relaxation as per GoI norms)
qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Chemistry from a recognized university or equivalent (Results awaiting / completed)

how_to_apply: Download the prescribed application format (FORM No. 8).
Fill the application completely and attach recent passport size photograph.
Enclose self-attested copies of all supporting documents (educational certificates, experience, etc.).
Send the application by Registered Post / Courier to the Principal Investigator.
Address: Dr. Greegar George Assistant Professor Department of Civil Engineering National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli – 620 015, Tamil Nadu
important_instructions: Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Bring all original documents at the time of interview. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Incomplete applications or applications received after the last date will be rejected. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate.

content_sections.heading: NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Office of the Dean (R & C), National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli invites applications from Indian Nationals for the post of Project Assistant in the project titled “GGBS based Composite Cement Applications: Hydration Mechanisms and Material Solutions” funded by India Cements Limited. Download NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant 2026
content_sections.text: Download the prescribed application format (FORM No. 8). Fill the application completely and attach recent passport size photograph. Enclose self-attested copies of all supporting documents (educational certificates, experience, etc.). Send the application by Registered Post / Courier to the Principal Investigator. Subject on envelope: “Project Assistant” Address: Dr. Greegar George Assistant Professor Department of Civil Engineering National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli – 620 015, Tamil Nadu

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant Candidates
content_sections.text: Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Bring all original documents at the time of interview. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Incomplete applications or applications received after the last date will be rejected. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Trichy Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 22 July 2026 by 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Master's degree in Chemistry from a recognized university (results awaiting or completed).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Assistant at NIT Trichy?
faq.answer: Consolidated emoluments of Rs. 27,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in NIT Trichy GGBS Project 2026?
faq.answer: Only 1 vacancy for Project Assistant.

faq.question: Q5. What is the duration of the Project Assistant position at NIT Tiruchirappalli?
faq.answer: The duration of the project is 8 months.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: Send the duly filled prescribed application form along with bio-data and supporting documents by post/courier to Dr. Greegar George.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for NIT Trichy Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: Age should be less than 32 years (relaxation as per Government of India norms).

faq.question: Q8. Is prior experience mandatory for NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant?
faq.answer: No, but experience in research, industrial, or related fields will be considered.

faq.question: Q9. Where should I send the application for NIT Trichy Project Assistant?
faq.answer: To Dr. Greegar George, Assistant Professor, Department of Civil Engineering, NIT Tiruchirappalli – 620 015.

faq.question: Q10. Will there be any interview for NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant selection?
faq.answer: Yes, only shortlisted candidates will be informed and called for interview. No separate call letter will be issued.
